FlourUsagePerBeaker.description: Amount of flour used by each beaker

SpecialLiquidUsagePerBeaker.description: Amount of special liquid used by each beaker

SlimeProducedPerBeaker.description: Amount of slime produced by each beaker

WasteProducedPerBeaker.description: Amount of waste produced by each beaker

NumBeakersUsed.description: The number of beakers of type i used

constraints.description: The total amount of flour used by all beakers does not exceed FlourAvailable.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(quicksum(FlourUsagePerBeaker[i] * NumBeakersUsed[i] for i in range(NumBeakers)) <= FlourAvailable)

constraints.description: The total amount of special liquid used by all beakers does not exceed SpecialLiquidAvailable.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(quicksum(SpecialLiquidUsagePerBeaker[i] * NumBeakersUsed[i] for i in range(NumBeakers)) <= SpecialLiquidAvailable)

constraints.description: The total amount of waste produced by all beakers does not exceed MaxWasteAllowed.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(quicksum(WasteProducedPerBeaker[i] * NumBeakersUsed[i] for i in range(NumBeakers)) <= MaxWasteAllowed)

objective.description: The total amount of slime produced by all beakers is maximized.

code.gurobipy: model.setObjective(quicksum(SlimeProducedPerBeaker[i] * NumBeakersUsed[i] for i in range(NumBeakers)), GRB.MAXIMIZE)
